changes: Improved drag resistance for vehicles, added new keys and sections to custom vehicles, and updated official ones.

Fixed a lot of bugs with vehicles, for example in manual, starting from a high gear and releasing throddle after gaining speed no longer gets stuck. Vehicles are now using real drag and resistance physics.
Turning off engine no longer cuts speed and engine immediately.
Fixed bugs with multiplayer server, especially when all players are finished racing. Players are no longer stuck.
Layed the ground work for future cross-platform compatibility on other operating systems for the game itself.
Major code refactor in many areas, such as keyboard, joystick, window, text input, and multiplayer packet handling.
Update vehicle creation guide and added a lot of details for new and existing sections and explanations.
serverChanges: Updated server room model and explicit race finish events for players.
Fixed bugs with race finish events.
